1758720.name: Trainz 2019 DLC - CEFX AC4400CW #1026-1059
1758720.description:
The 1026-1059 Series was delivered to CIT Group/Capital Finance between the years of 2004/2005. This delivery was based on the specifications very last CP AC4400CW order from GE. This model is a representation of this series between the years 2010 to current with the repainted simplified no beaver paint scheme. Cabs are exactly created to prototype.

Features…

4 different skins
Realistic Specular/normal map texture effects
Air Hoses and MU Cables
Functioning and interactive computer screen
Functioning dynamic brakes
Auto Running Numbers
Road specific highly detailed cab view
Scripted cab functions
Realistic in-cab sounds
Openable engine compartment doors,
Openable Front and Rear cab doors,
Highest qualify GE 7FDL engine sound recording in Trainz
1758720.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文
